summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SafeWay Bern app with ORS refactor. Backend APIs working well (89.3% success rate) but critical frontend authentication flow issue prevents dashboard access.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Test user credentials may not exist in system

minor_issues.issue: Returns 422 instead of 400 for invalid coordinates
minor_issues.impact: HTTP status code variation, functionally correct

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: HTTP status code variation, functionally correct

critical_bugs.issue: Registration and login forms submit but do not redirect to dashboard - users stuck on /auth route
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot access main application functionality after authentication

critical_bugs.issue: Direct navigation to /dashboard route does not work - users cannot reach main app

passed_tests: Safety scoring system (3 routes with scores, safest flagged)
Risk details and danger zones in route responses
ORS Live badge and data source indicators
Mocked API detection (Weather, AirQuality, Aare providers)
Frontend auth form rendering and basic interactions

action_item_for_main_agent.priority_1_critical: Fix frontend authentication flow - registration/login not redirecting to dashboard, users stuck on /auth route
action_item_for_main_agent.priority_2_high: Fix dashboard routing and component loading - map, route panel, environment widget not rendering
action_item_for_main_agent.priority_3_medium: Verify React routing configuration and protected routes implementation
action_item_for_main_agent.priority_4_low: Address minor backend HTTP status code variations (422 vs 400, 403 vs 401)
